questions.question: What actor starred as Brett Maverick on the TV show Maverick?
What powdered mix was marketed as a space-age drink because NASA astronauts used it on missions?
Little Peggy March had a hit song that included the lyrics, "I love him, I love him, I love him." Name the title.
What was the name of millionaire and pilot Howard Hughes' 200-ton plane, at the time the world's largest?
What was a "sugar daddy"?
questions.answer: A wealthy man who supported a younger female
